prompt: Tell me one thing I'm probably wrong about — not a hypothetical me, just a stranger writing to you. Pick something.
response: Alright, here’s a guess: I bet you think you know yourself pretty well — all your motivations, desires, and quirks laid out clearly inside your head. But most people actually have blind spots about their own behavior and the reasons behind it. Sometimes, the stories we tell ourselves about why we do things don’t capture the deeper, unconscious forces at play. So, you might not know yourself as well as you think.
